pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which downloads the file from raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif to this path.
Verified via export_result.sh which parses the XML of the DIMAP file specifically at this path.
Verified via task instructions explicitly specifying a spatial subset of exactly 300 pixels wide.
Verified via task instructions explicitly specifying a spatial subset of exactly 300 pixels high.
Verified via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for an exported file starting with this prefix.
Verified via export_result.sh which checks for the exported file inside this specific directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF downloaded from opengeos GitHub repository to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The expected output subset DIMAP file is correctly specified as /home/ga/snap_projects/farm_subset.dim with a required dimension of 300x300 pixels, as confirmed by task descriptions and the verification extraction script. The scatter plot export directory (/home/ga/snap_exports/) and filename prefix ('red_nir_scatter') exactly match the extraction logic in export_result.sh.
